# Prayag Upadhyay

> Software builder (LLMs, Java, Python, distributed systems), father, optimist,
> writer, and meditator based in the Pacific North West. Personal homepage.

## About
- Name: Prayag Upadhyay (handle: prayagupa)
- Role: Staff Software Builder — backend and distributed systems
- Also: father, optimist, meditator, builder
- Interests: software engineering, writing, meditation
- Building with: LLMs, RAG, AI agents, MCP
